items.title: Mega AI Cloud Deals And Convertible Raise Could Be A Game Changer For Nebius Group (NBIS)
items.description: Nebius Group recently secured multi-billion-dollar, multi-year AI infrastructure contracts with Microsoft and Meta, raised about US$2.75 billion in convertible senior notes plus a US$1 billion equity offering, and continued positioning itself as a major alternative AI cloud provider in Europe and North America. At the same time, Nebius is using its AI cloud to back early-stage robotics and physical AI startups with US$1.5 million in compute credits, highlighting how it is cultivating future...

items.title: Stocks to Watch Wednesday Recap: JPMorgan, Cracker Barrel, EchoStar
items.description: ↗️ JPMorgan Chase (JPM): Shares of the largest U.S. bank rebounded 3.2% after a down day Tuesday stemming from new expense guidance. Banks in general performed well Wednesday in a broad market rally. ↗️ Cracker Barrel (CBRL): The restaurant chain's adjusted per-share quarterly loss was smaller than expected, but the company cut its annual outlook.

items.title: The 3 Best Tech Stocks to Buy for 2026, According to Our Columnist
items.description: Longtime readers know I’m a big fan of the Dan Benton school of investing.  Benton, who once ran the world’s largest technology hedge fund, prioritized finding the best product cycles that can drive positive earnings surprises.

items.title: Why Microsoft Stock Tumbled Today
items.description: For hardly the first time in its history, the company has come under the scrutiny of legal officials.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Indexes Eye Record Highs On Fed Rate Cut, Powell's Comments; Palantir Jumps (Live Coverage)
